title: centaurea pallescens var. iberica
intro: Centaurea pallescens var. iberica is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae), known for its distinctive purple flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea pallescens var. iberica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
